title: Expo SQLite init + generic entities repo + sync queue repo

task.description: Implement Expo SQLite wrapper with idempotent init plus two repositories: (1) generic JSON entity table for offline-first storage and (2) sync_queue table for pending mutations. Provide CRUD helpers used by stores and sync engine.
acceptance_criteria: initDb() can be called twice consecutively without throwing and creates tables if missing
upsertEntity(entityType,id,json,updatedAt,syncStatus) inserts or replaces a row and getEntity returns deep-equal parsed JSON
listEntities(entityType) returns an array sorted by updatedAt DESC (string compare)
enqueueSyncItem persists an item and listPendingSyncItems returns items ordered by createdAt ASC
updateSyncItem(itemId,patch) updates attemptCount/status/lastError; deleteSyncItem removes the row
All functions return Promises and do not block the JS thread with large synchronous loops

definition_of_done: No screen imports required; app compiles after merge
SQLite init and queries use parameterized statements (no string interpolation for values)
